name: Sasha
subtitle: the one who stayed in the apartment

ultimate_ability.label: The Duet
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, sit down at the same space as Reed and play. SYNC ticks twice; Doubt halves for the rest of this turn.

notes: Sasha's hand is the lovers loop — PACK / LISTEN / KEEP / RELEASE as starters. Reed is in the room with you the whole time, as a scripted partner-visitor whose patience tracks SYNC. The win condition pairs you at a threshold together. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
